More information is needed. 
Test run in tinderbox with mail/dovecot2 shows no 'leftovers' when run with default option Knobs 
Please update your portstree and try again. 
Check your 'make.conf' for strange WITH_* options. 
If this only shows up with one set of options, please follow with specifics so we can replicate problem
